title: KakashiPlayz PvP Pack
description: This PvP Pack is a Clean, Optimized Resource Pack Designed For Competitive Minecraft PvP.
body:
# KakashiPlayz PvP Pack

# Overview

KakashiPlayz PvP Pack is a Minecraft resource pack featuring clean visuals and simplified textures. The pack focuses on a minimal style suitable for PvP gameplay.

# Features

* Clean and smooth resolution textures
* Short swords for improved visibility during fights
* Custom hit particles and combat effects
* Clear and minimal GUI
* Custom textures forweapons, and PvP items
* Reduced visual clutter

# Pack Details

* Version: V1
* Category: PvP / Combat

# Compatibility

Works With Most Modern Minecraft Version's.It Can Be Used in Both Singleplayer and Multiplayer Servers.

# Installation

1. Download the ".zip" file
2. Open Minecraft
3. Go to Options → Resource Packs
4. Click Open Pack Folder
5. Move the pack into the folder
6. Enable it in-game

# Author Information

* Creator: KakashiPlayz!
* Portfolio Website: https://kakashiplayz.vercel.app
* Discord Server: https://discord.gg/QdTN4BFkTv

# Support

For issues, suggestions, or feedback, join the Discord server: https://discord.gg/QdTN4BFkTv
